title: Disable Create & Delete of Item but Enable Column Edit for Roles

posts.author: jberlin (J)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a board called “Main.”

I want to allow roles to edit specific columns but not have the ability to add/remove items or rows.

As of now, I can restrict column edits for everything BUT the columns for them; however, they can still create or delete the entire item… Can’t have that!
